headline: Here is Why Fair Isaac (FICO) is One of the Best Growth Stocks for the Next 2 Years
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the best growth stocks to invest in for the next 2 years. On April 28, FICO reported total revenue of $691.7 million for FQ2 2026, marking a 39% increase compared to $498.7 million in the prior year. GAAP net income for the period rose to $264.5 million, or […]
